description: A set of the United Blood Nation street gang, founded in 1993 on Rikers Island, New York City, by Omar Portee and Leonard McKenzie. The gang operates primarily on the East Coast of the United States, engaging in drug trafficking, sex trafficking, racketeering, robbery, and counterfeiting. It has been the target of multiple federal investigations and prosecutions.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang has operated in the U.S. state of Virginia and other states. It has allegedly been engaged in the sex trafficking of women and racketeering in Virginia , New York , North Carolina , Baltimore , New Jersey and other areas.
country_links.context: The gang operates in multiple U.S. states including Virginia, New York, North Carolina, Baltimore, New Jersey, and Georgia, engaging in drug trafficking, sex trafficking, racketeering, and other crimes.
